title: Transaction lifecycle
description: A successfully acquired transaction resource must be committed, rolled back, or transferred to an explicit owner before operation exit.

actions.description: Acquire responsibility for a transaction-scoped resource.
Cancel or roll back the transaction resource.
Transfer responsibility to a declared transaction or recovery owner.

obligations.statement: Every successfully acquired resource must reach a terminal action on every applicable exit.
applicability: the resource has not been transferred before the operation boundary
